> **输入：**`nums = [1,2,2]`
**输出：**`1`

        let required_value = neighbors_max + 1;

        let cost_contribution = if required_value > nums[i] {
            required_value - nums[i]
        } else {
            0
        };

        cost_b += cost_contribution;
        i += 2;
    }

    // Return the minimum cost found
    cost_a.min(cost_b)
}
